# Chapter 11: Decision-making under uncertainty  (~110 pp)
- 11.1 Decision theory: utility, risk, regret (15) · 11.2 Expected utility and its critics (12) · 11.3 Markov decision processes (18) · 11.4 Partially observable MDPs (12) · 11.5 Multi-criteria decision-making (15) · 11.6 Decision-making in real organisations (15) · 11.7 Failure section: anchoring, framing, motivated reasoning in engineering decisions (23)

**Archetype**: uncertainty, ethics. **Project**: solve a small MDP with three alternative algorithms; reconcile. **Exercises**: 25.
